description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a dark fence, featuring a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and several lounge chairs. The house has a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with large rectangular windows and a prominent balcony on the upper floor. The front of the house includes a gated entryway and arched windows, while the rear opens onto a tiled patio area with outdoor seating and landscaping, including a purple-leaved tree. The exterior walls are primarily light gray with a contrasting dark band running horizontally across the upper story. The property is enclosed by a fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a fenced perimeter, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, a purple tree, and the rear facade of the house with large windows and a balcony.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, the pool area, and the fence, with the purple tree and pool equipment visible.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the house, featuring arched windows, the main gate, and the entryway.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the house, the pool, and the patio area, emphasizing the outdoor living space and fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with arched windows, a simple main door, and no porch or columns
